data.title: Vibranium Labs secures $4.6M seed funding for Vibe AI, the first 24/7 AI Incident Engineer.
data.description: Agentic AI-powered incident response platform, Vibe AI, developed by Vibranium Labs is set to expand and strengthen industry partnerships following a seed funding round. The funding, totaling $4.6 million, was led by Calibrate Ventures and Mirae Asset. The efforts aim to enhance the capabilities of Vibe AI and advance its market reach in the sector.

data.title: Prevent Blindness supports National Glaucoma Awareness Month with webinar and resources- CHICAGO, Dec. 23, 2025
data.description: In January, Prevent Blindness will be conducting a new webinar on glaucoma in Chicago. The webinar will provide free resources such as videos featuring patient testimonials and expert advice, fact sheets, a webpage dedicated to glaucoma information, and a compilation of financial assistance programs available for those affected by the condition. The organization aims to raise awareness and educate the public about glaucoma through these comprehensive resources.

data.title: Sept 2025: AccountTech Data shows surprising shift in gross profit margins in real estate sector in Boston, indicating tightening margins.
data.description: In September 2025, a recent report from AccountTech's industry index in Boston uncovered a significant financial development. The analysis highlighted a surprising trend: gross profit margins within the real estate brokerage industry underwent a notable tightening. This unexpected shift showcases a compelling narrative in the sector. The specific figures and data points from the report lead to insightful conclusions about the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: Texas sees rise in holiday DUI crashes prompting Daniel Stark Injury Lawyers to advocate for safer roads.
data.description: Daniel Stark Injury Lawyers in Bryan, Texas, urged drivers to prioritize road safety during the busy holiday season of December 2025. The law firm emphasized that a single reckless choice while driving could result in significant, lasting impact. The call for safer roads comes as a timely reminder to Texas drivers, as statistics reveal that during the holidays there is a notable increase in road accidents. It is crucial for all individuals behind the wheel to exercise caution and responsibility, as even a momentary lapse in judgment can lead to severe injuries or fatalities. Daniel Stark is leading the charge to raise awareness about the importance of safe driving practices during this festive time, as the consequences of a preventable accident can be devastating for all parties involved.

data.title: Xsolla sponsors Global Game Jam 2026, supports creators worldwide. Collaboration strengthens commitment to game developers, community growth.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Xsolla, a prominent worldwide video game commerce firm supporting game developers in launching, expanding, and monetizing their games, revealed a fresh collaboration with Global Game Jam (GGJ) as the headline sponsor for the 2026 event cycle. This partnership underscores Xsolla's dedication to assisting developers of varying expertise levels and broadening prospects for creators within the global game development sphere. The Global Game Jam unites tens of thousands.

data.title: Gnosis instigates hard fork after $116 million theft from Balancer exploit; resulted from majority Gnosis validators adopting soft fork initially.
data.description: On Monday, a hard fork took place after most Gnosis validators implemented a soft fork due to a Balancer exploit in November. The exploit led to the theft of approximately $116 million in cryptocurrency.

data.title: ShipHero dominates G2 Winter 2026 Awards, ranks #1 in WMS with 93% User Satisfaction, handling 1.3% of total volume.
data.description: ShipHero has once again surpassed traditional WMS Providers, claiming the top position in the G2 Winter 2026 Report with an impressive 93% user satisfaction rate. Based in New York, the leading Warehouse Management System facilitated the movement of 1.3% of the total goods.

data.title: Buckeye Risk Services donates 100+ toy trucks to Akron Children's Hospital for the holidays to bring cheer to kids.
data.description: In Akron, Ohio, on December 23, 2025, Buckeye Risk Services, a company offering specialized insurance products for automotive and trucking sectors, generously contributed over 100 toy trucks to Akron Children's Hospital. The donation aimed to bring holiday cheer to kids celebrating Christmas and Hanukkah at the hospital.

data.title: In 2026, potential top performers could include ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, and DOGE as charts hint at support defense, though resistance may spark selling.
data.description: Analysis indicates that key cryptocurrencies such as ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, and DOGE are expected to see bullish support at current levels. However, it is anticipated that as prices rise, there will be increased selling pressure. This suggests that ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, and DOGE may experience attempts to uphold current support levels, but could face resistance as prices climb higher leading to a potential influx of sellers.

data.title: QuickBooks named top self-employed accounting tool for UK freelancers in Consumer365 review.
data.description: In a recent report released on December 23, 2025, Consumer365 reviewed accounting platforms for solo entrepreneurs, freelancers, and small businesses in the UK. QuickBooks emerged as the top digital solution for handling HMRC Self Assessment and tax management. This comprehensive analysis serves as a guide for individuals and businesses navigating these financial processes.

data.title: Toll Brothers opens Cove Amenity Center at Regency in Apollo Beach, offering resort-style amenities for 55+, open daily.
data.description: Tour the new 55+ active adult community to see the resort-style amenities now available every day.

data.title: Vivant Health ACO saved $10 million, $1,960,425 in recent years, leading in quality care for high-risk Medicare populations.
data.description: Vivant Health, based in Sacramento, California, revealed today that its Accountable Care Organization (Vivant Health ACO) has successfully obtained over $10 million in total shared savings within the last three performance years. Among this figure, the organization achieved savings of $1,960,425 for...
